summary: Comprehensive testing of Aljabr Laundry branch management system completed. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), but frontend has critical Select dropdown issues preventing form submissions.

ui_bugs.issue: Select component validation error prevents city selection in both Edit Branch and New Branch forms
ui_bugs.error_message: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete form submission due to city dropdown selection failure

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct cards
All form elements have correct data-testid attributes
Search and filter UI elements present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component validation issue in city dropdowns. The SelectItem components need proper value props. This is blocking all form submissions in Edit Branch and New Branch forms.
